channel.title: Music on Boring Game
channel.description: Recent content in Music on Boring Game

item.title: It Was a Good Time
item.description: It Was a Good Time Tracklist Composer Track Name BPM Length Author & Boring Game Golden Era 150 04:51 Author & Boring Game ALL I WANT IS DEATH 200 05:12 Author & Boring Game LSD 128 04:09 Author & Boring Game I DON’T GIVE A FUCK 130 04:36 Author & Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game Kidnapping 240 06:27 Boring Game Gloomy Day 40 09:22 Author & Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game Isolation 75 05:27 Author & Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game Gaslighting 300 04:00 Boring Game The Crowded Hut 160 06:08 Boring Game Journey 40 10:45 Author & Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game Rotten Muppets 40 11:34 Boring Game Bipolar Disorder 35 09:39 Release Date: 2025/10/13 Total Length: 1:22:14 Artwork: Boring Game Download

item.title: Chasing a Perfect Yesterday EP

item.title: Take Care, Mo_yang

item.title: Where Am I... EP

20190317 這張專輯是被 blackleaf 強迫才做出來的。 Tracklist Composer Track Name BPM Length Boring Game Dream 67 04:03 Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game I AM NOT A RABBIT! 256 04:07 Boring Game I Hate You, Blackleaf 170-200 04:19 Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game I AM NOT A PET! 180 04:32 Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game I AM A BOY! 200 04:33 Boring Game No Way Back 128 04:42 Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game Januaream 181 05:02 Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game 20190317 110-220 05:05 Boring Game _ 65-130 05:42 Boring Game Resurrection 60-120 06:00 Night_Rabbit vs Boring Game Fish vs Carrot 220 06:02 Boring Game Give Up the Struggle 58 08:11 Release Date: 2025/04/16 Total Length: 1:02:22 Artwork: Night_Rabbit Download

item.title: Singles
item.description: Singles 以下為 Boring Game 所有參與的單曲列表。 2023 Composer Track Name Illustrator BPM Length Date Know Scratcher + Boring Game The Old End, the New Beginning Boring Game 80 06:12 2023/06/14 Boring Game 10-YEAR ANNIVERSARY Boring Game 190 02:06 2023/08/13 Author & Boring Game Pink Pills Boring Game 180 03:17 2023/09/04 Author & Boring Game Happy Halloween Mo_yang 128 02:09 2023/10/31 Mo_yang × Boring Game A Whale of a Time Mo_yang 200 02:47 2023/12/10 Know Scratcher + Boring Game Rapid Step Boring Game 67-134 04:20 2023/12/16 2024 Composer Track Name Illustrator BPM Length Date Know Scratcher + Boring Game It’s My Birthday!

item.title: Bad Life
item.description: Bad Life 這張專輯花了我 2154 天（2017/02/14 ~ 2023/01/08）製作。所有歌曲皆運用 Musescore 3 製作。 Tracklist Composer Track Name BPM Length Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 0| 100 08:05 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 1| 100 12:07 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 2| 50-100 07:22 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 3| 60-120 07:16 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 4| 10-1000 07:59 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 5| 120-200 11:22 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 6| 40-190 10:37 Release Date: 2023/01/08 Total Length: 1:04:51 Artwork: Mo_yang Download

item.title: Boring Album
item.description: Boring Album 這是我的第一張專輯，未來可能打造成一個系列。所有歌曲皆運用 Musescore 3 製作。 Tracklist Composer Track Name BPM Length Boring Game Ice 100-200 02:03 Boring Game Happy 350 02:07 Boring Game Why 100-300 04:26 Boring Game Monster 180 02:14 Boring Game Hand 120 02:28 Boring Game Anxious Person 120 02:12 Boring Game Psychosis 111.11 02:43 Boring Game Rain 99.9 02:22 Boring Game This Is Not a Rabbit 50 02:44 Boring Game Knife 80 02:30 Boring Game Die 100 03:00 Boring Game Red 200 02:09 Release Date: 2022/12/25 Total Length: 31:03 Artwork: Boring Game Download
